The '''IBC Arcology''' was a massive pyramidal structure on [[Aargau/Legends|Aargau]] owned by the [[InterGalactic Banking Clan/Legends|InterGalactic Banking Clan]]. The [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] garrisoned the structure early in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], despite the technical neutrality of Aargau. It claimed that [[IG-227 Hailfire-class droid tank/Legends|Hailfire droids]] seen on [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]] were produced in this arcology.

There was also an [[IBC Arcology (Coruscant)|IBC Arcology]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].
